## Behavior

What user-visible or system behavior changed?

## TDD

- [ ] Failing test added first (or existing test updated first)
- Red: which test failed and why
- Green: what code change made it pass
- Refactor: what cleanup was done after tests were green

## Verification

- [ ] `flutter pub get`
- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay attention to (trade-offs, follow-ups, assumptions).
